sacco

Class QuestionBlock

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.QuestionBlock

  • public class QuestionBlock
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Detail

      • QuestionBlock

        public QuestionBlock(int blockType)
        Constructs a new QuestionBlock at (0,0). The parameter is used to determine whether or not this block is a Red block or a Yellow block
        Parameters:
        blockType - The int representing which type of block this is. Yellow is 9999 and Red is 2475

    • Method Detail

      • paintSelf

        public void paintSelf(sacco.PaintBrush brush)
        Paints this object on using the PaintBrush provided

      • update

        public void update()
        Updates the QuestionBlock to display the next image in the animation strip

      • setScale

        public void setScale(double scale)
        Sets the scale of the QuestionBlock. A scale of 1 will make the the QuestionBlock 16x16
        Parameters:
        scale - the scale of the QuestionBlock

      • setX

        public void setX(int x)
        Sets the x of the Question Block
        Parameters:
        x - The x of the Question Block

      • setY

        public void setY(int y)
        Sets the y of the Question Block
        Parameters:
        y - The y of the Question Block
